name: Miniature Meat Balls & Sauce Recipe
recipeIngredient: 4 Slices Day-Old Bread, or more as required
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak bread in water for 2 or 3 minutes, then squeeze out excess moisture.
2. Combine the soaked bread with the remaining ingredients, except spaghetti sauce. Mix well.
3. Form into about 40 small meatballs.
4. Brown the meatballs slowly at medium heat in olive oil or margarine.
5. Add spaghetti sauce and cook for 30 minutes over low heat.
Serves 20
Source: Spalding Family Recipe
